content.body: Do you mean links to the algorithm from places that would use it? Not that I see. But it is intended to implement "Paint the specified [rectangular, circular, ...] area" from, say https://html.spec.whatwg.org/#drawing-rectangles-to-the-bitmap
Another way of putting it is that it defines what "using this's fill style" means.
Ok, thanks. Seems like it should be 'connected' better.
[Yoav Weiss](https://matrix.to/#/@yoavweiss:matrix.org)I can give you push access to my fork if that works for you
content.formatted_body: Yoav WeissI can give you push access to my fork if that works for you

content.body:
Hi , I was working with url parameters and I have this url.searchParams.getAll function that I am using to get the desired utm value.

But I have observed that for some urls, even though the params are present in the url, the javascript code that I am executing ( real time on page load) doesn't capture the values.

Any idea why this could be happening?

Does it take some time for the url params to load on the page or something..?

Where can I read more about how it all works under the hood ?
Luca Casonato: looks like you'd need to sign up to participate in the HTML stream for us to be able to land https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/10327
content.formatted_body: Luca Casonato: looks like you'd need to sign up to participate in the HTML stream for us to be able to land https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/10327

content.body: In order to add you to the meeting I need an email address. Cheers!
Oops, saw your DM now, continuing there.
What is the website that allows searching all specifications? Or at least finding all cross links?
